page_metadata.biotools__summary: VAD-MM/GBSA is a variable atomic dielectric MM/GBSA model for improved accuracy in protein-ligand binding free energy calculations. In VAD-MM/GBSA, simuled annealing was used for dielectric optimization.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: VAD-MM/GBSA is a variable atomic dielectric MM/GBSA model for improved accuracy in protein-ligand binding free energy calculations. In VAD-MM/GBSA, simuled annealing was used for dielectric optimization.
